import React from "react"; import { Trash, Eye, Book } from "react-bootstrap-icons"; import { Card, Button, Container, Row, Col } from "react-bootstrap"; import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; function Deck({decks}) { console.log(decks) const all = decks.map(item => item) console.log(all) return ( {decks.name}

{decks.id} cards

 {decks.description} ); } export default Deck;
